commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
<?php
// store_otp.php
require_once 'config.php';
$email = $_POST['email'] ?? '';
$otp = $_POST['otp'] ?? '';
$response = ['status' => 'error'];
if ($email && $otp) {
    // Get expiration from settings (default 10 min)
    $exp_min = 10;
    $set = $conn->query("SELECT value FROM system_settings WHERE name='otp_expiration_minutes' LIMIT 1");
    if ($set && $row = $set->fetch_assoc()) $exp_min = (int)$row['value'];
    $expires_at = date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime("+{$exp_min} minutes"));
    // Get name for email
    $stmt = $conn->prepare('SELECT full_name FROM users WHERE email = ? LIMIT 1');
    $stmt->bind_param('s', $email);
    $stmt->execute();
    $stmt->bind_result($name);
    $stmt->fetch();
    $stmt->close();
    // Remove old OTPs
    $conn->query("DELETE FROM password_reset_otps WHERE email='$email'");
    // Insert new OTP
    $stmt2 = $conn->prepare('INSERT INTO password_reset_otps (email, otp_code, expires_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?)');
    $stmt2->bind_param('sss', $email, $otp, $expires_at);
    if ($stmt2->execute()) {
        $response = ['status' => 'ok', 'name' => $name];
    }
    $stmt2->close();
}
echo json_encode($response);
